title: Quick XP
description: Automatically throw experience bottles with highly customizable delay, chance, and click simulation! Lightweight & clean GUI.
body:
# ⚡ Quick XP

**Quick XP** is a lightweight, high-performance client-side Fabric mod designed to streamline your experience mending armor and tools. No more destroying your mouse switches or spamming right-click—let the mod handle it flawlessly with complete configuration.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🚀 **Unthrottled Throwing:** Wipes out the hardcoded vanilla cooldowns to let you throw experience bottles smoothly.
* 🎛️ **Customizable Delay:** Adjust the tick spacing between each throw using a smooth config slider ($0$ to $20$ ticks).
* 🎲 **Randomization (Chance):** Add human-like randomness to your throws ($0\%$ to $100\%$) to keep packet distribution dynamic.
* 🔬 **Click Simulation:** Simulates actual mouse clicks under the hood so your favorite CPS HUDs register the clicks layout.
* 🎨 **Clean GUI Configuration:** Fully integrated with **Cloth Config** and **ModMenu** for a seamless settings menu.

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT: SERVER PERMISSION NOTICE

> 📢 **Read Before Use:** > Quick XP is a client-side utility mod. Before utilizing this mod on any multiplayer network or public server, **please ensure you have explicit permission from the server administration or staff.** > 
> Using auto-clicking or unthrottled fast-throw mechanics on competitive servers without permission may violate their rules and can result in automated bans by their anti-cheat systems. **Use responsibly and check your server guidelines first!**

---

## 🛠️ Configuration & Settings

Open your **ModMenu** settings, locate **Quick XP**, and customize your setup:

* **Enable Mod:** Toggle the entire auto-throw engine on or off instantly.
* **Delay:** The spacing between bottle throws. Lower values equal rapid firing.
* **Chance:** The probability percentage that a bottle will throw on any given tick.
* **Click Simulation:** Emulates hardware click calls to keep visual HUD modules happy.

---

## 👥 Credits & Authorship

* **Developer:** Made with ❤️ by **R3MU**.
* **License:** MIT License — Free to include in any custom modpack!
